build.details: Build completed successfully with 3 warnings (pre-existing performance warnings). No TypeScript errors introduced by the fix.

tsxFix.details: TextCard.tsx line 58 correctly applies !important modifiers to ::after pseudo-element classes that conflict with Gutenberg's default styles. All critical positioning and z-index properties use ! prefix.

phpUnchanged.details: TextCard.php line 25 correctly left unchanged with non-!important ::after classes. Frontend does not have Gutenberg editor styles, so !important modifiers are not needed.

domStructure.details: No <span> elements found in TextCard.tsx. DOM structure maintained - only CSS classes modified. Previous <span> workaround successfully removed.

frontendRendering.details: All 12 masonry-cards sections render correctly. All 54 cards have role='listitem', all grid containers have role='list'. No regressions detected.

accessibility.details: ARIA roles continue to work correctly. Image alt text now populated on all 18 images. No accessibility regressions from the editor-only fix.

passedChecks.details: Line 58: md:after:!absolute md:after:!inset-x-0 md:after:!top-auto md:after:!bottom-0 md:after:!h-1/2 md:after:!-z-1 all correctly include ! prefix
passedChecks.evidence: Critical properties overriding Gutenberg defaults: !absolute (position), !inset-x-0 (horizontal), !top-auto (prevents inset:0 top override), !bottom-0 (prevents inset:0 bottom override), !h-1/2 (height), !-z-1 (z-index behind content)

passedChecks.details: Line 58: md:after:bg-accent and md:after:rounded-3xl correctly omit ! prefix - these properties don't conflict with Gutenberg styles
passedChecks.evidence: bg-accent and rounded-3xl are visual styling only, no conflict with Gutenberg's selection outline

passedChecks.details: Line 25: md:after:absolute md:after:inset-x-0 md:after:top-auto md:after:bottom-0 md:after:h-1/2 md:after:bg-accent md:after:rounded-3xl md:after:-z-1 all without ! prefix
passedChecks.evidence: Frontend does not load Gutenberg editor styles, so !important is unnecessary and would add unnecessary specificity

passedChecks.details: Grep search for '<span' returned no matches. Previous <span> workaround successfully removed.

editorOnlyFix.reason: Gutenberg loads default ::after selection styles that conflict with tall TextCard's split background effect

conflictingStyles: inset: 0 (conflicts with block's top: auto, bottom: 0)

editorOnlyFix.solution: Use Tailwind ! prefix to generate CSS with !important flag, increasing specificity to override Gutenberg's higher-specificity selector
editorOnlyFix.frontendUnaffected: Frontend does not load Gutenberg editor styles, so PHP template does not need !important modifiers

classesWithImportant: md:after:!top-auto - CRITICAL: Prevents Gutenberg's inset: 0 from setting top: 0
md:after:!bottom-0 - CRITICAL: Prevents Gutenberg's inset: 0 from removing bottom: 0
md:after:!h-1/2 - CRITICAL: Forces height to 50%, overriding Gutenberg's full coverage from inset: 0
md:after:!-z-1 - CRITICAL: Forces z-index: -1, overriding Gutenberg's z-index: 1
classesWithoutImportant: md:after:bg-accent - Background color doesn't conflict with Gutenberg
md:after:rounded-3xl - Border radius doesn't conflict with Gutenberg
tsxImplementation.reasoning: Only properties that conflict with Gutenberg's ::after default styles need !important. Visual properties like background color and border radius don't conflict and don't need extra specificity.

phpImplementation.classes: md:after:absolute md:after:inset-x-0 md:after:top-auto md:after:bottom-0 md:after:h-1/2 md:after:bg-accent md:after:rounded-3xl md:after:-z-1
phpImplementation.reasoning: Frontend rendering does not load Gutenberg editor styles. The ::after pseudo-element works correctly without !important modifiers. Adding !important would create unnecessary CSS specificity without any benefit.

domStructureVerification.userFeedback: User requested: 'don't change the structure, use css classes to override wp default style'
domStructureVerification.currentImplementation: No DOM changes. Only CSS classes modified with !important flags.
domStructureVerification.verification: Grep search confirms no <span> elements in TextCard.tsx

afterPseudoElement.sync: PASS - Intentional difference for editor-only conflict resolution

criteria.requirement: Editor-only fix correctly scoped to TSX

productionReadiness.recommendation: Editor-only fix is correctly implemented. The !important modifiers target only the CSS properties that conflict with Gutenberg's default ::after selection styles. The PHP template correctly remains unchanged since the frontend does not load Gutenberg editor styles. No DOM changes, no frontend regressions.
